title: glechoma raphanorhiza
intro: Glechoma raphanorhiza, also known as Creeping Thyme or Ground Ivy, is a perennial herb native to Asia and Europe. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Glechoma raphanorhiza include reducing stress and anxiety, improving respiratory health, and aiding in the treatment of digestive issues such as ulcers and diarrhea. Glechoma raphanorhiza can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in cooking and as a natural remedy for various health conditions.
